title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus GPU cluster, addressing a key weakness: lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to other frontier labs. The video argues the AI race is shifting from benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
